title: eriophorum angustifolium
intro: Eriophorum angustifolium, also known as the cotton grass or tussock cotton-grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The roots and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Eriophorum angustifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
